evidence_support: Mature oligodendrocyte panel (CellMarker 2.0, PanglaoDB); MBP/PLP1/ASPA/CNP all near-saturating
annotation_note: Mature oligodendrocyte; PLP1 cell_ratio 0.997, MBP 0.92, ASPA 0.80. Same cell type as cluster 11 (largest oligo cluster). PENK/SLC1A3 here are ambient/background.

evidence_support: Striatal direct-pathway MSN panel (Allen Brain Atlas, Saunders 2018); DRD1/TAC1/PDYN co-expressed
annotation_note: Direct-pathway MSN: TAC1 0.94, GPR149 0.80, DRD1 0.74, PDYN 0.58. PENK (D2) here is ambient (flagged globally).

evidence_support: Striatal indirect-pathway MSN panel (Allen Brain Atlas, Saunders 2018); DRD2/ADORA2A/GPR6 co-expressed
annotation_note: Indirect-pathway MSN: PENK 0.99, DRD2 0.71, ADORA2A 0.70, GPR6 0.60. Cluster-specific DRD2/ADORA2A confirm D2 over ambient PENK alone.
Astrocyte: SLC1A3 0.99, GPC5 0.87, AQP4 0.82. A weak neuron signal here is ambient PENK/TAC1, not a doublet (confirm per-cell if needed). Same type as cluster 9.

evidence_support: Generic striatal MSN; no specific D1 or D2 subtype marker dominates
annotation_note: Medium spiny neuron, subtype UNRESOLVED: PENK 0.82 and TAC1 0.63 are both non-specific/ambient here; DRD1 (0.21) ~ ADORA2A (0.21), DRD2 0.09. Likely low-RNA/transitional MSN. Verify D1/D2 split and possible low-quality cells.
Oligodendrocyte precursor: PDGFRA 0.69 (cluster-specific; ~0.01-0.02 elsewhere) is definitive. SLC1A3 is shared with astrocytes; input label Astrocyte is incorrect.
Microglia: P2RY12 0.75, CX3CR1 0.51 (both cluster-specific). PENK/PLP1/TAC1 here are ambient.

evidence_support: Neuroblast/proliferating panel (DCX, SOX4/11; TOP2A/MKI67); Allen developmental atlas
annotation_note: Proliferating neuroblast: DCX 0.43 and TOP2A 0.12 are cluster-specific (DCX mean 0.98 vs ~0.3-0.5; TOP2A 0.31 vs ~0.005 elsewhere). Plausible adult SVZ neurogenesis; weak overall signal, treat as provisional.

evidence_support: Striatal GABAergic interneuron panel; Munoz-Manchado 2018 Cell Reports scRNA-seq + PatchSeq (LHX6 specifies Sst/Npy and Pvalb INs)
annotation_note: GABAergic interneuron: LHX6 0.16 (specific; ~0.005 elsewhere), SST 0.29, NPY 0.26, VIP 0.20 all enriched. Script's D1-MSN candidate overridden — interneuron markers dominate. PENK/TAC1 are ambient.
Astrocyte: SLC1A3 0.90, AQP4 0.78, GPC5 0.48. Same cell type as cluster 3. PENK/PLP1 here are ambient.
Endothelial: ESAM 0.55, VWF 0.53, PECAM1 0.49, NOS3 0.14 — all highly cluster-specific (~0.01 elsewhere). Top PENK/PLP1 are ambient.

Mature oligodendrocyte: PLP1 0.98, MBP 0.81, ASPA 0.71. Same type as cluster 0 (smaller cluster). Moderate P2RY12/CX3CR1 (0.48/0.28) suggests minor microglial contamination; rule out oligo-microglia doublet per-cell.

evidence_support: Committed oligodendrocyte precursor (COP); GPR17/BCAS1 mark the OPC->oligo intermediate (Marques 2016; Glia COP review)
annotation_note: Committed oligodendrocyte precursor / newly-forming oligodendrocyte: GPR17 0.81 (specific) + mature PLP1/MBP/CNP high but PDGFRA low (0.08). Distinct from classic PDGFRA+ OPC (cluster 5). Script's plain OPC refined to COP.
